| AC3: updateCapacity → saved with new value | ✅ implemented | `AC3: updates the warehouse capacity and persists it` + `AC3: updateCapacity throws WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND…` | Also guards the not-found path; `save` not called on missing warehouse |
